qualifying_formats.name: Fair Strike
qualifying_formats.description: Get a strike for not winning your group, last place in the group gets an additional strike, then eliminated after a certain number of strikes

qualifying_formats.name: Max Matchplay Qualifying
qualifying_formats.description: A new tournament format meant as an alternative to Flip Frenzy or as a replacement for Round Robin tournaments. You’ll always have the maximum about of matches going and when games finish you can immediately create new ones to replace them.

qualifying_formats.name: Progressive Strike
qualifying_formats.description: Earn a strike for not winning a match for each position that is lost to the group winner, then eliminated after a certain number of strikes

qualifying_formats.name: Strike Knockout
qualifying_formats.description: Earn a Strike for losing and get eliminated after a certain number of strikes

qualifying_formats.name: Target Matchplay
qualifying_formats.description: Matchplay format, except Qualifying is over once a player achieves a target number of points earned.

finals_formats.name: Amazing Race
finals_formats.description: Amazing Race has all participants playing 1 machine, with the player finishing in last place being eliminated. Assuming this event is played until only 1 player remains, the number of meaningful games towards TGP is one more than the total number of playe

finals_formats.name: Custom League
finals_formats.description: Usually a variation of group play formats

finals_formats.name: Max Match Play
finals_formats.description: A new tournament format meant as an alternative to Flip Frenzy or as a replacement for Round Robin tournaments. You’ll always have the maximum about of matches going and when games finish you can immediately create new ones to replace them.
